requirement_topic.zh: 标签、警告及英法双语要求
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤、警告及英法雙語要求

summary.en: Canada requires toy-specific warning and safety information under the Toys Regulations where applicable, and prepackaged consumer products are subject to Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act requirements. Mandatory consumer label information generally must be presented in both English and French unless an exemption applies. Canada does not require CE marking on toys.
summary.zh: 加拿大在适用情况下依据《玩具条例》要求玩具特定警告和安全信息，预包装消费品还受《消费品包装和标签法》要求约束。强制性消费者标签信息通常须以英语和法语同时呈现，除非适用豁免。加拿大不要求玩具加贴CE标志。
summary.zht: 加拿大在適用情況下依據《玩具條例》要求玩具特定警告和安全資訊，預包裝消費品還受《消費品包裝和標籤法》要求約束。強制性消費者標籤資訊通常須以英語和法語同時呈現，除非適用豁免。加拿大不要求玩具加貼CE標誌。

standards_or_laws: Toys Regulations (SOR/2011-17), product-specific warning and labelling provisions
Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. C-38)
Consumer Packaging and Labelling Regulations (C.R.C., c. 417), bilingual requirements and exemptions

summary.en: China-market toys normally use Chinese-language labelling under GB 6675.1 and CCC rules, including product name, manufacturer details, age grading, warnings, and CCC mark where applicable. English/French bilingual packaging is not required for the Chinese domestic market.
summary.zh: 中国市场玩具通常按GB 6675.1和CCC规则使用中文标签，包括产品名称、制造商信息、年龄分级、警告以及适用时的CCC标志。中国国内市场不要求英法双语包装。
summary.zht: 中國市場玩具通常按GB 6675.1和CCC規則使用中文標籤，包括產品名稱、製造商資訊、年齡分級、警告以及適用時的CCC標誌。中國國內市場不要求英法雙語包裝。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.1-2014 — Safety of toys — Basic code, marking and instructions

gap.en: Canadian packaging usually requires redesign rather than simple relabelling: product identity, responsible party information, net quantity where applicable, safety warnings, age limitations, and instructions should be checked for English/French presentation, legibility, and permanence. CE, UKCA, or CCC marks have no Canada-wide toy approval function and should not be presented as Canadian certification marks.
gap.zh: 加拿大包装通常需要重新设计，而不只是贴一张标签：产品标识、责任方信息、适用时的净含量、安全警告、年龄限制和说明书均应核查英法双语呈现、可读性和持久性。CE、UKCA或CCC标志在加拿大没有全国性玩具批准功能，不应作为加拿大认证标志展示。
gap.zht: 加拿大包裝通常需要重新設計，而不只是貼一張標籤：產品標識、責任方資訊、適用時的淨含量、安全警告、年齡限制和說明書均應核查英法雙語呈現、可讀性和持久性。CE、UKCA或CCC標誌在加拿大沒有全國性玩具批准功能，不應作為加拿大認證標誌展示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — toy warnings and general prepackaged-product bilingual labelling rules apply unless a specific exemption applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese-language labelling and CCC marking apply for China-market toys; bilingual English/French is not a CN requirement

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China domestic toy packaging is normally not Canada-ready. Canadian sale usually requires English/French mandatory label content and Canada-specific warnings, with no CE-style or single Canadian toy mark to add.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国国内玩具包装通常不能直接用于加拿大销售。加拿大销售通常需要英法双语强制标签内容和加拿大专用警告，且没有需要加贴的CE式或单一加拿大玩具标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國國內玩具包裝通常不能直接用於加拿大銷售。加拿大銷售通常需要英法雙語強制標籤內容和加拿大專用警告，且沒有需要加貼的CE式或單一加拿大玩具標誌。
